'''Rh'ajah Fenn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] member of [[Clan Fenn]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] he was loyal to [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and an accomplice of his relative, [[Kh'aris Fenn]]. Kh'aris was murdered by [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] seventeen months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] when Vos disguised himself as Rh'ajah.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] {{1stm}}
